hooks.command: echo 'Context is being compacted. If meaningful progress was made this session, update CLAUDE.md (## Current State) so it survives.'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"MEMORY CHECK: Did the user just (1) pick an option you presented, (2) confirm a design choice, (3) state a preference, (4) correct your approach, or (5) align on behavior? Did something fail — a bug, an abandoned approach, a rejected design, a repeated mistake? If YES to any: STOP and save to memory NOW, before doing anything else. One file per topic, update MEMORY.md index."}}'
